Klein Moretti.hair_style: medium-length, slightly tousled and swept back with loose strands falling over the forehead
Klein Moretti.build: lean, slim but with defined shoulders
Klein Moretti.face_description: handsome young man with a sharp jawline, slightly narrowed confident brown eyes, strong brow ridge, straight nose, thin lips with a subtle smirk; refined scholarly features with a pale complexion and faint shadows under the eyes
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale young man with tousled black hair swept back, wearing a long black Victorian overcoat draped cape-style over shoulders revealing deep purple lining, dark waistcoat over white dress shirt with dark cravat/tie, brown leather cross-body holster strap with visible buckle, dark trousers
Klein Moretti.color_palette: black, deep purple, white, dark brown leather, charcoal gray
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; originally had brown eyes (not black); wears glasses as Zhou Mingrui; has eye bags and hint of double chin in original form; frequently shapeshifts into alternate identities (Sherlock Moriarty, Gehrman Sparrow, Dwayne Dantès, Merlin Hermes); Mythical Creature (formerly Human); resurrected 6 times
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver chain with a hanging topaz pendulum, revolver in holster, cane
Klein Moretti.faction: Tarot Club (Major Arcana) / Church of the Fool
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Used a silver chain with topaz for spirit dowsing; mentioned his holster and revolver, and not having his cane.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: long black Victorian overcoat (cape-draped with purple lining), dark charcoal waistcoat, white dress shirt, dark cravat/tie, brown leather cross-body holster strap, dark trousers
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always depicted with a long black overcoat draped cape-style revealing purple lining, brown leather cross-body holster strap; carries a silver chain with pure topaz pendulum in left sleeve; official image shows Chinese characters 克莱恩·莫雷蒂 (Klein Moretti)
Klein Moretti.wiki_source_notes: Image confirms: black hair, pale skin, purple-lined cape-style overcoat, brown leather cross-body strap, dark waistcoat over white shirt. Wiki corrects eye_color from black to brown (brown eyes confirmed in wiki appearance text and infobox lists both black and brown). Wiki adds full biographical details including species (Mythical Creature) and resurrection count. Current DB was largely accurate; main correction is eye color.

Dunn Smith.hair_style: short, neatly combed back with a slight part, receding hairline
Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Angular face with a strong jawline, straight nose, high cheekbones, deep-set gray eyes with a penetrating gaze; clean-shaven with a composed, slightly melancholic expression
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: Tall, lean man in his mid-thirties with short black hair and deep gray eyes, wearing a black double-breasted Victorian trench coat with epaulettes, holding a gold-handled walking cane
Dunn Smith.color_palette: black, dark charcoal, gold accents, white, pale skin
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.unique_identifier: gold-handled walking cane and belted black trench coat with epaulettes
Dunn Smith.wiki_source_notes: Image (official art): black hair, pale skin, double-breasted black trench coat with epaulettes and belt, gold-handled cane, tie pin, chain on coat. Wiki infobox confirms hair_color as black (correcting DB's 'light brown' — wiki text says light brown but infobox says black; official image clearly shows black hair, so image+infobox win). Wiki confirms gray eyes, thirties age range, Nighthawk captain role. Appearance section's 'light brown hair' is overridden by both the official image and the infobox field showing black.

Aiur Harson.unique_identifier: handsome middle-aged face with noticeable wrinkles around the eyes and a heavy gray trench coat
Aiur Harson.era_clothing_lock: heavy gray wool trench coat over a dark three-piece Victorian suit, white cravat, and formal leather shoes
Aiur Harson.face_description: Handsome features with visible wrinkles at the corners of the eyes, giving him a distinguished yet weary look.
Aiur Harson.visual_anchor: Handsome middle-aged man with eye wrinkles, wearing a heavy gray Victorian trench coat over a dark suit.

Leonard Mitchell.hair_style: medium-length, slightly wavy and tousled, swept back with strands falling over forehead
Leonard Mitchell.face_description: sharp, handsome features with angular jawline and refined bone structure; slightly narrowed eyes giving a confident, aloof expression
Leonard Mitchell.visual_anchor: Mid-20s male with tousled black hair and green eyes, wearing a long black coat with red lining over a white dress shirt, grey trousers, black leather belt, red gloves, and tall black boots; confident poetic stance
Leonard Mitchell.distinguishing_features: high spiritual perceptivity; magnetic deep voice; recites poetry; formerly human, now Mythical Creature; host of Pallez Zoroast parasite; Sequence 4 Nightwatcher of Darkness pathway
Leonard Mitchell.accessories: red leather gloves, black leather belt with buckle, black wrist cuffs
Leonard Mitchell.source_notes: Explicitly described as black-haired and green-eyed, wearing a feather hat, a shirt, and a vest.
Leonard Mitchell.era_clothing_lock: long black coat with red lining, white dress shirt, grey trousers, black leather boots, red gloves
Leonard Mitchell.wiki_source_notes: Image: black coat with red lining, white shirt, grey trousers, red gloves, tall black boots, slim build, tousled black hair, sharp handsome face. Wiki: green eyes, black hair, age 25-28, The Star codename, Tarot Club + Red Gloves affiliations, Sequence 4 Nightwatcher, Mythical Creature. Current DB confirmed: gender male, fair skin, black hair, green eyes, tall, confirmed confidence.

Madam Lorotta.unique_identifier: always wears masculine Victorian attire including tight black trousers and leather boots
Madam Lorotta.era_clothing_lock: masculine-cut black wool frock coat, starched white shirt, tight black wool trousers, polished black leather boots
Madam Lorotta.face_description: Pretty oval face with a nonchalant expression, often having a slight, friendly curve at the corners of her mouth.
Madam Lorotta.visual_anchor: Early 30s black-haired woman with a friendly smile, dressed in a masculine black Victorian frock coat, tight black trousers, and leather boots.
Madam Lorotta.color_palette: deep black, crisp white, charcoal grey
Madam Lorotta.source_notes: Described as 'black-haired Lorotta' and wielding a 'dull gold revolver'.

Man in Halved Top Hat.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat)
Man in Halved Top Hat.era_clothing_lock: Black evening banquet tuxedo, halved top hat.
Man in Halved Top Hat.face_description: Face painted in three pastel colors (red, yellow, and white) with the sides of his lips arched high like a clown.
Man in Halved Top Hat.visual_anchor: lanky older male with hair graying at the sides and a weathered face, always wearing a halved black top hat and a black formal Victorian suit
Man in Halved Top Hat.color_palette: deep black, charcoal grey, pale ivory
Man in Halved Top Hat.primary_clothing: black suit with halved top hat of the same color
Man in Halved Top Hat.distinguishing_features: refined bearing, purchasing Beyonder potion ingredients (cow teeth paeonol, white-edged sunflower petals, elf flowers — Spectator potion ingredients)
Man in Halved Top Hat.accessories: cane adorned with silver, gold-framed spectacles
Man in Halved Top Hat.source_notes: Explicitly described appearing in a black tuxedo and halved top hat with clown makeup.

Ray Bieber.primary_clothing: Victorian middle-class attire, dark waistcoat and white shirt
Ray Bieber.face_description: Recessed eyes with a tall nose bridge and a sagging philtrum; relatively mild bearing.
Ray Bieber.visual_anchor: 30-year-old male with curly black hair and deep blue eyes, wearing a grey wool frock coat and featuring a sagging philtrum.
Ray Bieber.color_palette: deep blue, charcoal grey, snowy white
Ray Bieber.distinguishing_features: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth; sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.source_notes: Physical details (hair, eyes, tooth, philtrum) confirmed via Old Neil's magical portrait ritual; age and occupation confirmed by police report.
Ray Bieber.unique_identifier: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth and a sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.era_clothing_lock: grey wool frock coat, white linen shirt with a stiff starched collar, dark blue silk cravat, charcoal wool trousers

Borgia.unique_identifier: prominent knife scar on the side of his face and sharp eagle-like brown eyes
Borgia.era_clothing_lock: black wool frock coat, dark grey waistcoat, starched white shirt, dark trousers, and sturdy leather boots
Borgia.face_description: Cold, sharp features with eagle-like brown eyes and a visible knife scar on the side of his face.
Borgia.visual_anchor: Cold-looking man with sharp eagle-like brown eyes and a facial knife scar, wearing a black Victorian frock coat and dark waistcoat.
Borgia.color_palette: pitch black, dark chocolate brown, steel gray
Borgia.distinguishing_features: knife scar on face, sharp eagle eyes
Borgia.source_notes: Described as a cold man with a knife scar and sharp eagle eyes from the Backlund diocese.
